Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-12-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-15-2021 Continued

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Natalie Repin, via ZOOM, Anastasia Repin, via ZOOM, and Ludmila Repin, via ZOOM, Petitioners.

The court begins by querying the parties regarding who lives at the real property. Natalie reports that only her mother, Ludmila, lives at the property. The court reminds the Petitioners that the initial petition reflects that all three parties share the same address and that if the parties do not all reside at the same address, the court's register of actions should include the addresses of all of the parties. The parties query the court how to provide the updated addresses - the court advises that can likely be done by filing a change of address form. The court then confirms with the parties that the major asset of the estate is the real property located on Irving Street and that the intent is to keep the property. After additional discussion, including, but not limited to, whether any of the parties have served as an Administrator or a court-supervised fiduciary, whether the parties have consulted with a probate attorney, the court advises the parties that it is ready to appoint Natalie as Administrator and declares the following: She will be appointed with limited authority; the court will consider the issue of bond; Shirley Yawitz will be appointed Probate Referee; a hearing on the status of filing of an Inventory and Appraisal will be set for 12/15/2021 and, a hearing on Status of Closing of Estate will be set for 8/17/2022.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Tso. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Continued To Jul-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
